narrative: Conventional 30-year refinance. Application complete 2026-04-15 with all 6 required elements. Loan Estimate delivered 2026-04-17 11:00, within the 3 business day requirement. Intent to proceed received 2026-04-19 before any additional fees beyond credit report. LE tolerances applied as required: zero-tolerance lender fee category unchanged from initial LE, 10% bucket within tolerance, unlimited category items reasonable. No changed circumstance triggers; no revised LE needed. Closing Disclosure delivered 2026-05-18 14:00; consummation scheduled 2026-05-21 14:00 — meets the 3 business day waiting period. APR recalculated and verified within 1/8% regular tolerance. Right-of-rescission notice issued for refinance; 3 business day rescission period 2026-05-22 through 2026-05-24. Records retention plan: 3 years post-consummation (5 years for CD). No tolerance violation; no APR variance redisclosure required.
